ddt:Target.Name: N_B02E_RADAR_UDS_PT_20161007
ddt:Target.Description:
[3]2016/04/14 NISSAN XX2 R.Urushihata Moodified and DTCs Mod Failure type: [C1A50] Add DTC : [C1A0C] Modified "CAN DIAG SUPPORT MNTR.can" request. 4th~7th byte data name.
[2]2016/3/03 NISSAN XX2 R.Urushihata Added "Generic ECU Name".
[1]2015/5/28 NISSAN XX2 C.Kudou Initial creation. [[2.17]]
2015/11/16 XX2 S.Shiota UDS TP -> $3E00 modify.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Connector is left side (see from the driver sheet)
Connector is right side(see from the driver sheet)

Data.Name: DataRead_$220200_#004_bit0_Holizontal displacement value in when EOL alignment
DataRead_$220201_#004_bit0_Vertical displacement value in when EOL alignment
DataRead_$220202_#004_bit0_Holizontal Alignment value on EEPROM current
DataRead_$220203_#004_bit0_Vrtical Alignment value on EEPROM current

Item.Text: Alignment condition not ready(Vehicle is moving)
Alignment condition not ready(System failure detected)
Alignment condition not ready (System failure detected and Vehicle moving)
Target setting offset in holizontal direction
Target setting offset in vertical direction

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Vertical displacement value in when EOL alignment
